text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Good morning! A delightful day starts with a warm greeting! Join me
now, everyone—good morning!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Also, I would like to announce that I, your class representative, will be
participating in the team triathlon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And I would like some teammates to join me! Please, please, please
let me know if you're interested!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And a good morning to you, too! What great energy to start the day
with!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So Bakushin O is entering the triathlon. I bet her team will fill up in no
time after that announcement.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! All right, we gotta start recruiting too!

text_block_list.name: Polite Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Ah, sorry... I don't think I can... I'm not that good at swimming or
cycling anyway, so...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh... But you can run!

text_block_list.name: Pessimistic Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but at this point, we don't stand a chance. Don't you know who
we're up against? The older students are entering too.

text_block_list.name: Pessimistic Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
They have more years of experience and training under their belt.
We'd only be turning the competition into a boring stomp.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uh... I hadn't thought of that...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We won't know unless we try. It's not like the results are already
decided.

text_block_list.name: Polite Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
True, you two might actually stand a chance! We'll sit this one out,
but we'll be rooting for you! Good luck!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Look, it's N-Narita Top Road. Sh-sh-she's talking about the triathlon.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Well then, we must make haste! I'd like her to join my team.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Looks like Opera O is going to scout Top Road for her team.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: She's getting scouted? Wow!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: She's so good that people come to her with offers. I see, so this is how the seniors team up...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...I completely forgot that we'd be competing against them. Hehe, I
must've gotten carried away...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Kita...

text_block_list.name: Excited Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey Top Road, you're entering the triathlon, right? Who's on your
team? I guess it doesn't matter as long as you're on it!

text_block_list.name: Calm Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I think you have a real shot at winning! I can't wait to see you
compete!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Um... I haven't actually decided if I'm entering or not yet. I mean, I'm
not that...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Coming through. Excuse me, Top Road. Are you still doubting if you
should participate?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm still thinking about it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a tragedy! Do you not hear it? The applause of the
audience! The cheers calling on you to seek glory!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is begging to see your dazzling performance on the
anniversary stage. Do you intend to disappoint them?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I know you do not. You are not so cruel. I believe that you will take
my hand and join me at the banquet!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: ...Are you... inviting me to your team?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! You are worthy of making an appearance in the legend of
the Overlord. I have long waited to make this fateful invitation!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: You have? ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Then I accept! Please allow me to join your team! I'll do my
best to live up to everyone's expectations!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! Together, we, the fiercest of heroes, shall enliven the show!
Now that we have myself, Top Road, and Doto, we only need one
more member.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wh-whaaa?! Y-you mean I was part of the team too?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll pass. I already told you I'm not interested.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you on Opera O's team? I thought I already turned down her
invite.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yes, I heard. But then I saw her registering you onto our team...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
So I stopped her and came to ask you myself! It wouldn't be right to
go behind your back.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks. I can't believe she did that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She dragged you into this too, I assume. You know... you ought to
stand up for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Opera O gave me the final push I needed to enter, but I made the
decision myself!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
She made me realize something. She said that people are hoping to
see me compete, so I should step up and get onstage!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
And I thought—she has a point! It's an honor to have people rooting
for me, so I don't want to let them down!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I think she sees some skill in me too, and that's why she came to ask
me in particular.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Or at least I think so. With the way she speaks, it's hard to understand
her sometimes!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You're seriously...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Fine. I'll join.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Really?! Thank you, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If I don't step in, you'll get wrapped around Opera O's little finger. You're too
naive for your own good.
